## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New metric (adds an evaluation metric)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

---

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes — 0 TypeScript errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes — 0 ESLint errors
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes — 0 Prettier diff
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage` passes — coverage thresholds met (90% lines/functions/statements, 85% branches)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds — ESM + CJS + `.d.ts` output generated
- [ ] New code has corresponding tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in README
- [ ] A changeset has been added (`pnpm changeset`) for user-facing changes

---

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include any relevant test commands or scenarios.
